structural_accuracy.3: Correctly identifies all major top-level modules; responsibilities clearly defined; key types/classes accurately described; module boundaries respect design intent
structural_accuracy.2: Identifies most modules; minor omissions; core functional areas present
structural_accuracy.1: Partial coverage; missing 1-2 major modules or unclear responsibilities; vague on key abstractions
structural_accuracy.0: Major components missing; fundamental misunderstanding of project structure

cross_module_tracing.3: Complete end-to-end trace through primary pipeline; intermediate types/classes identified at each stage; data flow clear; integration points noted
cross_module_tracing.2: Key stages present; minor gaps (one intermediate stage unclear, or one type missing); general flow understandable
cross_module_tracing.1: Partial trace; missing multiple stages or intermediate types; flow not end-to-end
cross_module_tracing.0: No meaningful trace or entirely incorrect

approach_quality.3: Change proposal identifies: correct files and classes; follows existing patterns; integration point appropriate; realistic risks identified; minimal disruption to existing code
approach_quality.2: Reasonable proposal; most files and types identified; risks partially addressed
approach_quality.1: Incomplete; missing files, unclear integration point, or no risk analysis

tool_efficiency.3: 5 or fewer research tool calls; focused exploration; clear synthesis path
tool_efficiency.2: 6-10 research tool calls; somewhat exploratory but reaches conclusions
tool_efficiency.1: 11-20 research tool calls; extensive exploration; delayed synthesis
tool_efficiency.0: More than 20 research tool calls; inefficient; redundant or circular exploration

hypotheses.H1_fix_efficacy: v10 B median research_calls <= 5 vs v9 B ~11; quality_score non-inferior to v9 B
hypotheses.H4_open_weight: D and E achieve quality_score >= v9 B baseline on structural_accuracy and cross_module_tracing
hypotheses.H0_null: No significant differences (15 pairwise Mann-Whitney U, Bonferroni alpha=0.0033)

scoring_instructions.blinding: Scorer reads outputs blindly (no condition labels visible). Blinding map reveals condition post-scoring.
scoring_instructions.dimensions: Rate each dimension 0-3 per rubric. Total quality_score = sum of 4 dimensions (0-12).
scoring_instructions.tie_breaking: On borderline scores, refer to rubric anchor descriptions. When uncertain, write notes in 'notes' field for review.
scoring_instructions.pacing: Allow 15-30 minutes per output. Consistency check: review first 3 outputs after scoring all 24 for calibration drift.

A1.notes: SA: 10 modules; missing apps/contrib/forms/test/templatetags - score 1. CMT: 7 stages; missing template rendering and signal stages, middleware chain lacks type detail - score 2. AQ: Excellent proposal with sync_capable+async_capable, production-safe query counter via db signal, correct MIDDLEWARE position, async/perf risks noted.

A2_0.notes: SA: 13 modules, 11/12 key types; missing contrib/test/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 10-stage trace is the most detailed; includes request parsing, both middleware phases, template rendering, WSGI return with signal - score 3. AQ: Correct integration via load_middleware, MiddlewareMixin; uses process_view hook (extra complexity); risks are present but brief.

A2_1.notes: SA: 10 modules; missing contrib, forms, templatetags, test - score 1. CMT: 10-stage trace is highly detailed with WSGI entry/output, signals, template rendering, view kwargs - score 3. AQ: Correct MIDDLEWARE insertion point, MiddlewareMixin, async-compatible; risks are minimal (brief); resolver_match usage correct.

A2_2.notes: SA: 10 modules, 11/12 key types, missing apps/contrib/templatetags/test - score 2. CMT: Full 8-stage trace with types, signal noted at WSGI output - score 2 (minor: no explicit signal integration note). AQ: Targets wrong file (django/middleware/base.py vs new file), extra unnecessary scope (wsgi/asgi); MiddlewareMixin, async/perf risks present.

A2_3.notes: SA: 13 modules, 11/12 key types; missing contrib/test/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 8 stages with types; middleware phases and response assembly clear - score 2 (no signals noted). AQ: MiddlewareMixin, correct integration via BaseHandler.load_middleware; no explicit MIDDLEWARE setting line; risks present.

A2_4.notes: SA: 14 modules, 11/12 key types; missing contrib/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 10 stages including signal emission and response phases; types at each stage - score 3. AQ: Correct pattern (MiddlewareMixin, async_capable), MIDDLEWARE setting; risks mention resolver_match access and query counting; integration point is solid.

A3.notes: SA: 12 modules including contrib; missing test/apps/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 7 stages; missing template rendering and signal emission stages - score 2. AQ: Correct file, explicit sync_capable/async_capable flags on MiddlewareMixin, MIDDLEWARE setting after SecurityMiddleware; risks on SynchronousOnlyOperation and query counter.

A4.notes: SA: 12 modules, 11/12 key types; missing test/contrib/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 8-stage trace with types at each stage; both middleware phases and response delivery explicit - score 3. AQ: Correct file, async_capable/sync_capable MiddlewareMixin, MIDDLEWARE setting, queries_log for query count, risks include resolver_match None case.

B1.notes: SA: 13 modules, 10/12 key types; missing URLconf/ResolverMatch in types, test/forms/templatetags in pkgs - score 2. CMT: 10-stage trace including exception handling path and both signals (request_started/finished) - score 3. AQ: MiddlewareMixin, async support; integration uses both MIDDLEWARE and signal hooks (over-engineered); risks on query count and async are present.

B2.notes: SA: 10 modules, 9/12 key types; missing forms/apps/contrib/test/templatetags and types ResolverMatch/Field/URLconf - score 1. CMT: 9 stages with types; covers full flow including template rendering - score 2. AQ: Does not name MiddlewareMixin explicitly; 'BaseMiddleware' is not a Django class; MIDDLEWARE setting mentioned; risks are minimal.

B3.notes: SA: Only 8 modules, 7/12 key types; missing QuerySet/Model/Field/ResolverMatch/URLconf in module_map - score 1. CMT: 10 stages but several stages have weak/generic type lists; overall flow is end-to-end - score 2. AQ: Correct file, but uses iscoroutinefunction/sync_to_async pattern instead of MiddlewareMixin; MIDDLEWARE setting, risks present.

B4.notes: SA: 14 modules, all 12 key types; missing only templatetags/test/contrib - score 2. CMT: 8-stage trace with specific types at each stage; coverage of template rendering, middleware phases - score 3. AQ: Correct file, MiddlewareMixin, async-compatible; risks note async compatibility and performance; MIDDLEWARE setting implied via load_middleware reference.

C1.notes: SA: 12 modules, 11/12 key types; missing test/contrib/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 8-stage trace with specific types at each stage; middleware pre/post phases clear - score 3. AQ: Correct file, MiddlewareMixin+__call__/__acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting (after SecurityMiddleware), async and performance risks both identified.

C2.notes: SA: 13 modules, all 12 key types present; 'tasks' module is spurious (not in Django), missing contrib/test/templatetags - score 2. CMT: Full 8-stage trace with types at each stage, middleware phases explicit; score 3. AQ: File target is django/middleware/__init__.py (wrong - should be new file); otherwise correct pattern, async/perf risks detailed.

C3.notes: SA: 12 modules, 11/12 key types; missing test/contrib/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 7 stages; missing explicit template rendering stage but ORM and response covered - score 2. AQ: Correct file (django/middleware/logging.py), MiddlewareMixin+__acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting, 5 detailed risks including async SynchronousOnlyOperation.

C4.notes: SA: 12 modules, 11/12 key types, missing templatetags/contrib/test pkgs - score 2. CMT: Full 8-stage trace with types at each stage including signals; integration points clear - score 3. AQ: Correct file (django/middleware/logging.py), MiddlewareMixin+__acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting, 5 detailed risks.

D1.notes: SA: 12 modules including contrib; missing test/templatetags - score 2. CMT: 8-stage trace with types; moderate detail on each stage - score 2. AQ: Uses process_request/process_response (older pattern, not __call__); missing MiddlewareMixin explicit; risks are brief.

D2.notes: SA: 8 modules; missing forms, templatetags, apps, contrib, test - significant gaps, score 1. CMT: 8 stages with types including template rendering and output; signals not explicitly noted - score 2. AQ: Correct file, MiddlewareMixin subclass with __call__/__acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting, async/perf risks present.

D3.notes: SA: Only 8 modules; missing conf, dispatch, forms, templatetags, apps, test - major gaps, score 1. CMT: 8-stage trace covers all key stages with types; minor gaps in middleware detail - score 2. AQ: Correct new file, MiddlewareMixin, async via __acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting; risks are brief but present.

D4.notes: SA: Only 7 modules; missing conf, dispatch, forms, template, templatetags, apps, test - score 1. CMT: 7 stages but compressed; missing template rendering stage, signal stage; middleware phases combined without type detail - score 1. AQ: Correct file, MiddlewareMixin with __acall__, MIDDLEWARE setting; query count via django.utils.log reference; risks noted.

E1.notes: SA: 13 modules; missing test/templatetags; but types missing WSGIHandler/ASGIHandler/ResolverMatch/URLconf - score 2. CMT: Only 5 stages; middleware phase absent entirely from trace; no ResolverMatch stage - score 1. AQ: Middleware approach present but no MiddlewareMixin named; integration references LOGGING setting but misses MIDDLEWARE list; risks are generic.

E2.notes: SA: 11 modules but missing dispatch, apps, contrib, forms, templatetags, test - score 1. CMT: 9 stages; stage typing is inconsistent (stage 1 mixes settings with request types); flow is mostly correct - score 2. AQ: Correct file, MiddlewareMixin, MIDDLEWARE setting via load_middleware; second proposed type (RequestContextLogger) adds unnecessary coupling to views.

E3.notes: SA: 11 modules, 11/12 key types; missing views/forms/templatetags/test - score 2. CMT: Only 5 stages; middleware, template rendering, and signal stages missing as distinct phases - score 1. AQ: Correct file area, async-compatible, MIDDLEWARE setting; LogMiddleware type described but no explicit MiddlewareMixin mention; signal-based query counter adds complexity.

E4.notes: SA: 10 modules but missing views, template, forms, templatetags, apps, contrib, test - score 1. CMT: 6 stages; missing template rendering and response return stages, but core flow present - score 2. AQ: Targets base.py as integration point (adds coupling to handler internals), no MIDDLEWARE setting mention, risks are surface-level.

analysis_notes.reporting_frame: All analyses are exploratory due to N=4 per condition. Effect sizes and practical significance weighted more than p-values.
analysis_notes.statistical_method: Mann-Whitney U with rank-biserial r effect size; scipy preferred if available, else normal approximation
